# panos_password_profile (Data Source)





<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `location` (Attributes) The location of this object. (see [below for nested schema](#nestedatt--location))
- `name` (String)

### Optional

- `password_change` (Attributes) (see [below for nested schema](#nestedatt--password_change))

<a id="nestedatt--location"></a>
### Nested Schema for `location`

Optional:

- `ngfw` (Attributes) Located within device-level configuration (see [below for nested schema](#nestedatt--location--ngfw))
- `panorama` (Attributes) Located in panorama. (see [below for nested schema](#nestedatt--location--panorama))
- `template` (Attributes) A management configuration object located within a specific template (see [below for nested schema](#nestedatt--location--template))
- `template_stack` (Attributes) A management configuration object located within a specific template (see [below for nested schema](#nestedatt--location--template_stack))

<a id="nestedatt--password_change"></a>
### Nested Schema for `password_change`

Optional:

- `expiration_warning_period` (Number) Password expiry warning period
- `post_expiration_admin_login_count` (Number) Password post-expiry admin login count
- `post_expiration_grace_period` (Number) Password post-expiry grace period
